_meta.kind: constructed reading — AI-generated in Chiron's voice from her own card meanings; NOT a recorded Chiron pairing
_meta.rule: individual card meanings are attested (cheatsheet); the COMBINED read is constructed and labelled as such, never claimed transcript-sourced
_meta.scope: pairs with no clean direct/clarifier/sequence passage

Five of Cups || Knight of Swords.order_note: No corpus passage names these two together, so draw order is not corpus-attested. Read as the two together.

Five of Cups || Knight of Swords.b_meaning: The Knight of Swords is somebody talking, asserting their thoughts through their words, but **not saying the truth**. They've got a lot to say, plenty of it, and none of it is what they actually feel.

Watch the shadow here, because the Lovers can turn into obsession dressed up as love, and the Hanged Man's clear sight is exactly what keeps somebody from surrendering to a wanting that went toxic.
